what_you_sell_and_to_whom: a dual-format daily essential nutrition system (a 1.1 oz on-the-go liquid shot plus softgels and a capsule in a patent-pending dual-chamber container) delivering 34 key ingredients at scientifically studied dosages across four nutrition cornerstones, in tailored HIS and HERS editions — for sophisticated, label-reading wellness shoppers (the AG1 churner is the primary buyer) who want to consolidate a multi-bottle supplement stack into one transparent, no-pixie-dusting daily ritual
product_type: dual-phase daily essential nutrition ritual: a 1.1 oz on-the-go liquid shot + 3 softgels + 1 capsule in a patent-pending dual-chamber container; 34 ingredients at scientifically studied dosages; tailored HIS and HERS editions; sold in 30-count (30-day supply, $115) and 90-count ($345) packs
tone: science-forward and label-led; mechanism over testimonial; validating rather than transformational (the category failed you, not your judgment); transparent, premium-but-accessible, anti-pixie-dusting; written for the earned-skepticism of a buyer who reads every Supplement Facts panel. Avoid hype verbs (boost, optimize, unlock) and influencer/lifestyle fluff.
proof_points: 34 key ingredients delivered at scientifically studied dosages — no pixie-dusting
Big Idea: 'One powder can't do it all.' AG1 is a greens powder; Aonic Complete is a complete daily nutrient platform
Four Cornerstones of Daily Essential Nutrition: Multivitamins & Minerals; Pre-, Pro- & Postbiotics; Omega 3; Superfoods & Greens
Patent-pending dual-chamber design: a 1.1 oz on-the-go liquid shot + 3 softgels + 1 capsule
Tailored HIS and HERS editions (HERS: cranberry + hyaluronic acid; HIS: lycopene + boron)
6 core benefits: 4-in-1 Daily Immune Support; Cellular Energy Support; Smooth Digestion for gut health; Brain Health & Function; healthier skin, hair & nails; heart & joint health

AG1 teardown: 3 ingredients at parity, 7 AG1 doesn't include at all (1g Omega-3, 50mcg D3, 200mcg K1, 180mcg Iodine, 20mg PQQ, 450mg Tributyrin postbiotic, 500mg Turmeric Curcumin), 6 AG1 underdoses, plus a gender layer AG1 lacks
Credibility stack: Senada Greca (Co-Founder & Scientific Advisor), Dr. David Jan, Ph.D. (Harvard-trained Staff Scientist), Dr. William Li, M.D. (Medical Advisor, NYT bestseller)
Press: Forbes, People Magazine, Yahoo Life, AthleTech News
Third-party tested; Made in the USA with globally sourced ingredients
Value: $115 consolidates $200–230/month of separate bottles — up to ~$1,800/year vs. building the equivalent stack a la carte

_help.brand_name: Customer brand name shown in reports.
_help.niche: Short category descriptor. Brand-approved category is 'Daily Essential Nutrition' — not 'multivitamin', 'greens powder', or 'foundational supplement'.
_help.what_you_sell_and_to_whom: One-line description of product + target audience.
_help.product_name: Exact product name to feature in generated ads.
_help.product_type: Form factor / packaging description. Aonic Complete is a DUAL-FORMAT ritual (liquid shot + softgels + capsule), not a powder.
_help.language: Language for text overlays in generated ads.
_help.product_image_filename: LEAVE BLANK until the user drops a product image into this folder. The skill warns gracefully if missing.
_help.logo_light_bg_filename: Parent 'Aonic' brand mark for light backgrounds (shared across the Aonic line; copied from the aonic-fuel profile).
_help.logo_dark_bg_filename: Parent 'Aonic' brand mark for dark backgrounds (shared across the Aonic line; copied from the aonic-fuel profile).
_help.tone: Brand voice descriptors. Used as a reference when Claude writes prompts.
_help.proof_points: Credibility claims to surface in generated ads where relevant. See current_state.md and the foundational docs for binding compliance language before using any of these in copy.
_help.product_line: All Aonic SKUs for context. Note: the 50+ healthspan buyer belongs to Aonic Flow, not Complete.
